message:
fix: add routes.jsonl to FindJSONLInDir skip list to prevent corruption

FindJSONLInDir's "last resort" fallback could return routes.jsonl in
dolt-native mode (where issues.jsonl doesn't exist, causing bd write
operations to overwrite route prefix data with issue export data.

Fixes: bd-yxyh6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -122,6 +122,16 @@ func TestFindJSONLInDir(t *testing.T) {
 			files:    []string{"interactions.jsonl", "issues.jsonl"},
 			expected: "issues.jsonl",
 		},
+		{
+			name:     "only routes.jsonl - returns default issues.jsonl",
+			files:    []string{"routes.jsonl"},
+			expected: "issues.jsonl",
+		},
+		{
+			name:     "routes.jsonl with deletions - returns default issues.jsonl",
+			files:    []string{"routes.jsonl", "deletions.jsonl"},
+			expected: "issues.jsonl",
+		},
 		{
 			name:     "only merge artifacts - returns default issues.jsonl",
 			files:    []string{"beads.base.jsonl", "beads.left.jsonl", "beads.right.jsonl"},
